headline: Ginger People audit — the proof is strong; the buy path is the constraint

themes.title: The purchase handoff is leaking demand
themes.summary: Strong product proof (86 reviews, World's #1 selling ginger candy, 10% fresh ginger) but no buying box on PDPs, a broken Where To Buy, and a /cart 404 mean high-intent sessions have no clear next step.

themes.title: A broad catalog asks shoppers to decode product names
themes.summary: Homepage and grids lead with SKUs, not jobs; mission cards and a need quiz would route relief, candy, and cooking shoppers faster.

themes.title: The content moat is under-commercialized
themes.summary: GLP-1 and health education can become reorderable routines and condition landing pages, and the format range supports kits and samplers.
